output:
Extracts and returns a list of URLs from the given XML data.
Arguments:
    xml_data (str): XML data as a string to parse; contains <durl> elements with nested <url> elements.
Returns:
    rawurl (list[str]): List of URL strings extracted from the XML data, in document order.
Raises:
    ExpatError: if XML parsing fails.
    IndexError: if expected <durl> or <url> elements or their text content are missing.
